title: Creative Crafting Menus
description: A creative mode QoL mod adding easily accessible crafting menus modified for better creative mode use
body:
Adds several crafting menus to the creative inventory, each designed for ease of use in creative mode. Also adds* a 2x2 crafting grid to the creative mode survival inventory *It was always in the game, just moved 2000 pixels up and to the left from the screen, lol. The mod just moves it back.

Crafting Menus

| Image | Description | | :---: | :--- | | ![Anvil menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/954154ef920604be500ea870dcadb4d399510c42.png) | **Anvil**

Contains two pages. One lets you easily edit an item's name & lore, with text formatting using Placeholder API.

The other lets you add, remove, and modify enchantments. | | ![Crafting menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/619bdb3afae515f13ce0fc2717d619688dc6bedb.png) | **Crafting**

A basic 3x3 crafting grid. Loads vanilla recipes when on a server. | | ![Loom menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69e7c5694521fdcdaaa5f9364d3d5ec6a0e6b096.png) | **Loom**

Banner editing suite. Lets you easily create, modify, and save banners. Contains many built-in banner presets for all your vexillology needs! | | ![Smithing menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70653d0838566f57a78bac19d891586ce1ab38b8.png) | **Smithing**

Customize gear here! Pages for trim pattern, trim material, and item material. |
Everything can be configured in-game with [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl).
